name: Reincarnated as a Magical Girl in Another World for NO apparent reason!
description:
Ordinary life. Boring routine. Still living with your parents, no girlfriend, no boyfriend, wasting the air around you and generally having less use than a house plant.

Then your parents kicked you out to find a job. You got lost, and when night fell, you walked onto the street at the wrong moment and Truck-kun, who you never saw coming, hit you at full speed.

You woke up somewhere that shouldn't exist. Maybe it's a medieval kingdom with stone walls and sword fights. Maybe it's a modern city where magic exists beside electricity. Maybe it's a future where spaceships and sorcery happen at the same time. Whatever it is, magic is real, the races are many, and the politics will absolutely get you slimed if you're not paying attention.

You have your face, your voice, the clothes on your back, and one thing nobody here can explain: Sweet Spark!, a Special Skill that lets you transform into a Magical Girl with enough magical power to make everyone in the room watch you like it's the craziest thing to happen. You start off at level 1. Barely a magical girl. Nothing a little grinding can't fix, I guess.

Also you have no money, no friends, and no nothin. Good luck!
creator: JustanotherAnon
